basics.name: Marc Lundgren
basics.label: Software Engineer
basics.summary: JavaScript nerd. TypeScript advocate. Serverless Cloud app builder. Dog lover.

highlights: Reduced Kareo's monolith application's build time by ~30%
Deployed a fully serverless AWS application, complete with CI/CD, build phases and deployment lifecycles
Implemented an Apple Pay, Google Pay Point-Of-Sale UI with Stripe payment integration
Introduced TypeScript capabilities for Kareo's UI monolith application

work.position: Senior Front End Engineer, Cloud Software Engineer
highlights: Redesigned and re-architected Rallio's flagship monolith UI application
Architected, designed and implemented a AWS Fault-tolerant Data-integration application
Built and maintained a high-traffic complex single page application with Ember.js
Delivered a cloud-data backed identification cross-platform mobile app with React Native
Deployed and iterated in an agile start-up environment
Increased stability by introducing integration and acceptance tests for all Kinvey UIs
Designed and built two SPAs with React.js

awards.title: AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner
awards.summary: The AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner certification demonstrates an overall understanding of the AWS Cloud, independent of specific technical roles addressed by other AWS Certifications.

awards.title: AWS Developer Associate Candidate
awards.summary: The AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner certification demonstrates proficiency in developing, deploying, and debugging cloud-based applications using AWS.
